# 环境准备

## **操作系统版本**

[root@node01 ~]# cat /etc/redhat-release Rocky Linux release 9.6 (Blue Onyx)

## JAVA版本

jdk1.8.0_202

## **RocketMQ版本**

rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release.zip

## **系统初始化**

### **关闭防火墙**

```shell
systemctl stop firewalld.service
systemctl disabled firewalld.service
```



### **关闭selinux**

```shell
sed -i '/SELINUX=/s/enforcing/disabled/' /etc/selinux/config
setenforce 0
```



### **修改句柄配置**

```shell
cat << EOF >> /etc/security/limits.conf
*               soft    nofile            65535
*               hard    nofile            65535
EOF
```

ulimit -n 65535

## **目录规划**

rocketmq相关软件压缩包存放于/root/soft目录下

mkdir -p /root/soft

rocketmq相关文件存放于/mid/rocketmq目录下

 mkdir -p /mid/rocketmq

## **java环境准备**

### **软件解压**

tar xzf /root/soft/jdk-8u202-linux-x64.tar.gz -C /usr/local

### **软链接配置**

 ln -s /usr/local/jdk1.8.0_202/ /usr/local/java

### **环境变量配置**

```shell
cat << EOF >> /etc/profile
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/java
export CLASSPATH=.:\$JAVA_HOME/lib/tools.jar:\$JAVA_HOME/lib/dt.jar
export PATH=\$JAVA_HOME/bin:\$PATH
EOF
```



### **加载环境变量**

 source /etc/profile

# **2主2从部署（错误示例）**

## **部署规划**

| IP地址       | 主机名 | 配置 | 部署软件            |
| ------------ | ------ | ---- | ------------------- |
| 192.168.1.11 | node01 | 2C4G | namesrv             |
| 192.168.1.12 | node02 | 2C4G | broker-a,broker-b-s |
| 192.168.1.13 | node03 | 2C4G | broker-b,broker-a-s |

## **部署架构**

   ![image-20251030122314181](D:\lmgsanm\03-个人总结\03-中间件\RocketMQ\image-20251030122314181.png)

## **部署过程**

### **hosts配置**

cat << EOF >> /etc/hosts

192.168.1.11    node01

192.168.1.12    node02

192.168.1.13    node03

EOF

### **软件准备**

#### **node01**

[root@node01 ~]# unzip soft/rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release.zip -d /mid/rocketmq/

[root@node01 ~]# mv /mid/rocketmq/rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release /mid/rocketmq/namesrv

[root@node01 ~]# ll /mid/rocketmq/

drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 21:29 namesrv

#### **node02**

[root@node02 ~]# ls -al /mid/rocketmq/

total 0 drwxr-xr-x 5 root root  55 Oct 29 22:33 . drwxr-xr-x 3 root root  22 Oct 29 22:33 .. drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 22:19 broker-a drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 22:19 broker-b-s drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 22:18 namesrv

#### **node03**

[root@node03 ~]# ls -al /mid/rocketmq/

total 0 drwxr-xr-x 5 root root  55 Oct 29 22:34 . drwxr-xr-x 3 root root  22 Oct 29 22:33 .. drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 22:23 broker-a-s drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 22:22 broker-b drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 22:22 namesrv

### **jvm参数修改**

**runserver.sh**

略

**runbroker.sh**

略

### **启动namesrv**

所有namesrv节点启动命令如下

**进入namesrv目录**

cd /mid/rocketmq/namesrv/

**启动namesrv**

nohup sh bin/mqnamesrv &

**查看启动日志**

 tail -10 nohup.out

Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM warning: Using the DefNew young collector with the CMS collector is deprecated and will likely be removed in a future release Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM warning: UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection is deprecated and will likely be removed in a future release. The Name Server boot success. serializeType=JSON, address 0.0.0.0:9876

**查看namesrv启动进程**

ps aux | grep namesrv | grep -v color

root        1488  0.0  0.0   7124  3328 pts/0    S    22:39   0:00 sh bin/mqnamesrv root        1492  0.0  0.0   7256  3328 pts/0    S    22:39   0:00 sh /mid/rocketmq/namesrv/bin/runserver.sh -Drmq.logback.configurationFile=/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/conf/rmq.namesrv.logback.xml org.apache.rocketmq.namesrv.NamesrvStartup root        1517 12.9  8.4 3492020 317496 pts/0  Sl   22:39   0:08 /usr/local/jdk1.8.0_202/bin/java -server -Xms1g -Xmx1g -Xmn256m -XX:MetaspaceSize=128m -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=128m -XX:+UseConcMarkSweepGC -XX:+UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection -XX:CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction=70 -XX:+CMSParallelRemarkEnabled -XX:SoftRefLRUPolicyMSPerMB=0 -XX:+CMSClassUnloadingEnabled -XX:SurvivorRatio=8 -XX:-UseParNewGC -verbose:gc -Xloggc:/dev/shm/rmq_srv_gc_%p_%t.log -XX:+PrintGCDetails -XX:+PrintGCDateStamps -XX:+UseGCLogFileRotation -XX:NumberOfGCLogFiles=5 -XX:GCLogFileSize=30m -XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow -XX:-UseLargePages -cp .:/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/bin/../conf:/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/bin/../lib/*:.:/usr/local/java/lib/tools.jar:/usr/local/java/lib/dt.jar -Drmq.logback.configurationFile=/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/conf/rmq.namesrv.logback.xml org.apache.rocketmq.namesrv.NamesrvStartup

**查看服务端口**

netstat -tupnl | grep java

tcp6       0      0 :::9876                 :::*                    LISTEN      1517/java

**broker配置和启动**

**配置****broker-a**

[root@node02 rocketmq]# cd /mid/rocketmq/broker-a/

[root@node02 broker-a]# cat << EOF > conf/2m-2s-async/broker-a.properties

brokerClusterName=SanmCluster

brokerName=broker-a

brokerId=0

deleteWhen=04

fileReservedTime=48

brokerRole=ASYNC_MASTER

flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH



namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876

EOF

**启动****broker-a**

[root@node02 ~]# cd /mid/rocketmq/broker-a

[root@node02 broker-a]# nohup sh bin/mqbroker -c conf/2m-2s-async/broker-a.properties &

[root@node02 broker-a]# tail -10 nohup.out

23:04:57,571 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.core.model.processor.AppenderRefModelHandler - Attaching appender named [RocketmqBrokerMetricsSiftingAppender] to Logger[io.opentelemetry.exporter.logging.LoggingMetricExporter] 23:04:57,571 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.classic.model.processor.LoggerModelHandler - Setting level of logger [RocketmqAuthAudit] to INFO 23:04:57,571 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.classic.model.processor.LoggerModelHandler - Setting additivity of logger [RocketmqAuthAudit] to false 23:04:57,571 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.core.model.processor.AppenderRefModelHandler - Attaching appender named [RocketmqAuthAuditSiftingAppender] to Logger[RocketmqAuthAudit] 23:04:57,571 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.classic.model.processor.RootLoggerModelHandler - Setting level of ROOT logger to INFO 23:04:57,571 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.core.model.processor.AppenderRefModelHandler - Attaching appender named [DefaultSiftingAppender] to Logger[ROOT] 23:04:57,573 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.logging.ch.qos.logback.core.model.processor.DefaultProcessor@2a70a3d8 - End of configuration. 23:04:57,575 |-INFO in org.apache.rocketmq.common.logging.JoranConfiguratorExt@289d1c02 - Registering current configuration as safe fallback point The broker[broker-a, 192.168.1.12:10911] boot success. serializeType=JSON and name server is node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876

**配置broker-b-s**

[root@node02 broker-a]# cd /mid/rocketmq/broker-b-s/

[root@node02 broker-b-s]# cat << EOF > conf/2m-2s-async/broker-b-s.properties

brokerClusterName=SanmCluster

brokerName=broker-b

brokerId=1

deleteWhen=04

fileReservedTime=48

brokerRole=SLAVE

flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH

namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876

EOF

**启动****broker-b-s**

[root@node02 ~]# cd /mid/rocketmq/broker-b-s/

[root@node02 broker-b-s]#  nohup sh bin/mqbroker -c conf/2m-2s-async/broker-b-s.properties &

**node03**

**关闭rocketmq服务**

**关闭broker**

sh bin/mqshutdown broker

**关闭namesrv**

sh bin/mqshutdown namesrv

The mqnamesrv(2552) is running... Send shutdown request to mqnamesrv(2552) OK

**broker配置修改**

[root@node02 ~]# cd /usr/local/rocketmq/rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release/ [root@node02 rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release]# cat << EOF > conf/2m-2s-async/broker-a.properties brokerClusterName=SanmCluster brokerName=broker-a brokerId=0 deleteWhen=04 fileReservedTime=48 brokerRole=ASYNC_MASTER flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH storePathCommitLog=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/commitlog storePathConsumerQueue=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/consumequeue namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876 EOF [root@node02 rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release]# cat conf/2m-2s-async/broker-b-s.properties brokerClusterName=SanmCluster brokerName=broker-b brokerId=1 deleteWhen=04 fileReservedTime=48 brokerRole=SLAVE flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH storePathCommitLog=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/commitlog storePathConsumerQueue=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/consumequeue namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876 EOF [root@node03 ~]# cd /usr/local/rocketmq/rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release/ [root@node03 rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release]# cat << EOF > conf/2m-2s-async/broker-b.properties brokerClusterName=SanmCluster brokerName=broker-b brokerId=0 deleteWhen=04 fileReservedTime=48 brokerRole=ASYNC_MASTER flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH storePathCommitLog=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/commitlog storePathConsumerQueue=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/consumequeue namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876 EOF [root@node03 rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release]# cat << EOF > conf/2m-2s-async/broker-a-s.properties brokerClusterName=SanmCluster brokerName=broker-a brokerId=1 deleteWhen=04 fileReservedTime=48 brokerRole=SLAVE flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH storePathCommitLog=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/commitlog storePathConsumerQueue=/usr/local/rocketmq/store/consumequeue namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876 EOF

**启动broker**

[root@node02 rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release]# nohup bin/mqbroker -c conf/2m-2s-async/broker-a.properties &

 [root@node02 rocketmq-all-5.3.3-bin-release]# ps aux | grep java root        

```

# **2主2从部署**

## **部署规划**

| IP地址       | 主机名            | 配置 | 部署软件            |
| ------------ | ----------------- | ---- | ------------------- |
| 192.168.1.11 | node01,broker-a   | 2C4G | namesrv，broker-a   |
| 192.168.1.12 | node02,broker-b   | 2C4G | namesrv，broker-b   |
| 192.168.1.13 | node03,broker-a-s | 2C4G | namesrv，broker-a-s |
| 192.168.1.14 | node04,broker-b-s | 2C2  | broker-b-s          |

## **部署架构**

![image-20251030122329859](D:\lmgsanm\03-个人总结\03-中间件\RocketMQ\image-20251030122329859.png)



## **hosts配置**

```
cat << EOF >> /etc/hosts
192.168.1.11   node01    broker-a
192.168.1.12   node02    broker-b
192.168.1.13   node03    broker-a-s
192.168.1.14   node04    broker-b-s
EOF
```



## **软件准备**

[root@broker-a ~]# ls -al /mid/rocketmq/

```
total 0
drwxr-xr-x 4 root root  37 Oct 29 23:30 .
drwxr-xr-x 3 root root  22 Oct 29 22:25 ..
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 23:30 broker-a
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 22:39 namesrv
```

[root@broker-b ~]# ls -al /mid/rocketmq/

```
total 0
drwxr-xr-x 4 root root  37 Oct 29 23:32 .
drwxr-xr-x 3 root root  22 Oct 29 22:33 ..
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 23:32 broker-b
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 22:47 namesrv
```

```

drwxr-xr-x 4 root root  39 Oct 29 23:33 .
drwxr-xr-x 3 root root  22 Oct 29 22:33 ..
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 22:23 broker-a-s
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 103 Oct 29 22:22 namesrv

drwxr-xr-x 3 root root  22 Oct 29 23:31 ..
drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 120 Oct 29 23:31 broker-b-s

## **启动namesrv**

### broker-a

[root@broker-a ~]# cd /mid/rocketmq/namesrv/

[root@broker-a namesrv]# nohup sh bin/mqnamesrv &

[root@broker-a namesrv]# tail -5 nohup.out

```
Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM warning: UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection is deprecated and will likely be removed in a future release. The Name Server boot success. serializeType=JSON, address 0.0.0.0:9876
```

[root@broker-a namesrv]# ps aux | grep namesrv | grep -v color

```
root        1366  0.0  0.0   7124  3200 pts/0    S    23:43   0:00 sh bin/mqnamesrv root        1370  0.0  0.0   7256  3328 pts/0    S    23:43   0:00 sh /mid/rocketmq/namesrv/bin/runserver.sh -Drmq.logback.configurationFile=/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/conf/rmq.namesrv.logback.xml org.apache.rocketmq.namesrv.NamesrvStartup root        1395  3.4  8.4 3502264 317280 pts/0  Sl   23:43   0:08 /usr/local/jdk1.8.0_202/bin/java -server -Xms1g -Xmx1g -Xmn256m -XX:MetaspaceSize=128m -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=128m -XX:+UseConcMarkSweepGC -XX:+UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection -XX:CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction=70 -XX:+CMSParallelRemarkEnabled -XX:SoftRefLRUPolicyMSPerMB=0 -XX:+CMSClassUnloadingEnabled -XX:SurvivorRatio=8 -XX:-UseParNewGC -verbose:gc -Xloggc:/dev/shm/rmq_srv_gc_%p_%t.log -XX:+PrintGCDetails -XX:+PrintGCDateStamps -XX:+UseGCLogFileRotation -XX:NumberOfGCLogFiles=5 -XX:GCLogFileSize=30m -XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow -XX:-UseLargePages -cp .:/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/bin/../conf:/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/bin/../lib/*:.:/usr/local/java/lib/tools.jar:/usr/local/java/lib/dt.jar -Drmq.logback.configurationFile=/mid/rocketmq/namesrv/conf/rmq.namesrv.logback.xml org.apache.rocketmq.namesrv.NamesrvStartup

### broker-a-s

[root@broker-a-s namesrv]# nohup sh bin/mqnamesrv &

[root@broker-a-s namesrv]#  tail -5 nohup.out

```
Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM warning: Using the DefNew young collector with the CMS collector is deprecated and will likely be removed in a future release Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM warning: UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection is deprecated and will likely be removed in a future release. The Name Server boot success. serializeType=JSON, address 0.0.0.0:9876

[root@broker-a-s namesrv]# ps aux | grep namesrv | grep -v color

```

## 配置broker

### **broker-a**

[root@broker-a namesrv]# cd /mid/rocketmq/broker-a/

[root@broker-a broker-a]# rm -fr conf/2m-2s-async/broker-{a-s,b,b-s}.properties

[root@broker-a broker-a]# cat conf/2m-2s-async/broker-a.properties

```
brokerClusterName=SanmCluster
brokerName=broker-a
brokerId=0
deleteWhen=04
fileReservedTime=48
brokerRole=ASYNC_MASTER
flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH
namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876
```

### **broker-b**

[root@broker-b namesrv]# cd /mid/rocketmq/broker-b/

[root@broker-b broker-b]# rm -fr conf/2m-2s-async/broker-{a,a-s,b-s}.properties

[root@broker-b broker-b]# cat conf/2m-2s-async/broker-b.properties

brokerId=0
deleteWhen=04
fileReservedTime=48
brokerRole=ASYNC_MASTER
flushDiskType=ASYNC_FLUSH
namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876
```

## 关闭broker

sh bin/mqshutdown broker

## **关闭namesrv**

sh bin/mqshutdown namesrv

# dledger集群部署

## 部署规划

| IP地址       | 主机名 | 系统配置 | 部署软件            |
| ------------ | ------ | -------- | ------------------- |
| 192.168.1.11 | node01 | 2C4G     | jdk,namesrv,dledger |
| 192.168.1.12 | node02 | 2C4G     | jdk,namesrv,dledger |
| 192.168.1.13 | node03 | 2C4G     | jdk,namesrv,dledger |

## 部署架构



## hosts配置

```
cat << EOF >> /etc/hosts
192.168.1.11 node01
192.168.1.12 node02
192.168.1.13 node03
EOF
```

## 软件准备

### jvm参数修改

### 软件分发

### 软件目录结构

dir /mid/rocketmq/

```
dledger  namesrv
```



## 部署过程

### 启动namesrv

cd /mid/rocketmq/namesrv/

nohup sh bin/mqnamesrv > nohup.out &

### 配置broker

#### node01

cd /mid/rocketmq/dledger/

```
cat << EOF > conf/dledger/broker-n0.conf
brokerClusterName = RaftCluster
brokerName=RaftNode00
listenPort=30911
namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876
storePathRootDir=/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00
storePathCommitLog=/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/commitlog
enableDLegerCommitLog=true
dLegerGroup=RaftNode00
dLegerPeers=n0-node01:40911;n1-node02:40912;n2-node03:40913
dLegerSelfId=n0
sendMessageThreadPoolNums=16
EOF
```



#### node02

cd /mid/rocketmq/dledger/

```
cat << EOF > conf/dledger/broker-n1.conf
brokerClusterName = RaftCluster
brokerName=RaftNode00
listenPort=30911
namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876
storePathRootDir=/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00
storePathCommitLog=/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/commitlog
enableDLegerCommitLog=true
dLegerGroup=RaftNode00
dLegerPeers=n0-node01:40911;n1-node02:40912;n2-node03:40913
dLegerSelfId=n1
sendMessageThreadPoolNums=16
EOF
```



#### node03

cd /mid/rocketmq/dledger/

```
cat << EOF > conf/dledger/broker-n2.conf
brokerClusterName = RaftCluster
brokerName=RaftNode00
listenPort=30911
namesrvAddr=node01:9876;node02:9876;node03:9876
storePathRootDir=/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00
storePathCommitLog=/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/commitlog
enableDLegerCommitLog=true
dLegerGroup=RaftNode00
dLegerPeers=n0-node01:40911;n1-node02:40912;n2-node03:40913
dLegerSelfId=n2
sendMessageThreadPoolNums=16
EOF
```

### broker启动

#### node01

nohup sh bin/mqbroker -c conf/dledger/broker-n0.conf > nohup.out &

#### node02

nohup sh bin/mqbroker -c conf/dledger/broker-n1.conf > nohup.out &

#### node03

nohup sh bin/mqbroker -c conf/dledger/broker-n2.conf > nohup.out &

### 端口服务

netstat -tupnl | grep java

```
tcp6       0      0 :::30911                :::*                    LISTEN      30427/java
tcp6       0      0 :::30909                :::*                    LISTEN      30427/java
tcp6       0      0 :::9876                 :::*                    LISTEN      30327/java
tcp6       0      0 :::40912                :::*                    LISTEN      30427/java
```



## 关闭broker

sh bin/mqshutdown broker

## **关闭namesrv**

sh bin/mqshutdown namesrv



## 数据存储目录结构

dir -R /mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/

```
/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/:
node00

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00:
abort  abort.bak  checkpoint  config  consumequeue  dledger-n1  index  lock  timerwheel

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/config:
consumerFilter.json      consumerOffset.json.bak     delayOffset.json      timermetrics      transactionMetrics
consumerFilter.json.bak  consumerOrderInfo.json      delayOffset.json.bak  timermetrics.bak  transactionMetrics.bak
consumerOffset.json      consumerOrderInfo.json.bak  timercheck            topics.json

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/consumequeue:
TopicTest

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/consumequeue/TopicTest:
0  1  2  3

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/consumequeue/TopicTest/0:
00000000000000000000

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/consumequeue/TopicTest/1:
00000000000000000000

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/consumequeue/TopicTest/2:
00000000000000000000

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/consumequeue/TopicTest/3:
00000000000000000000

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/dledger-n1:
checkpoint  checkpoint.bak  currterm  currterm.bak  data  index

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/dledger-n1/data:
00000000000000000000

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/dledger-n1/index:
00000000000000000000

/mid/rocketmq/dledger/rmqstore/node00/index:
20251103200419367

```



# **集群测试**

## **发送测试消息**

[root@broker-a broker-a]# export NAMESRV_ADDR=localhost:9876

[root@broker-a broker-a]# sh bin/tools.sh org.apache.rocketmq.example.quickstart.Producer

## **接收测试消息**

[root@broker-b broker-b]# export NAMESRV_ADDR=localhost:9876

[root@broker-b broker-b]# sh bin/tools.sh org.apache.rocketmq.example.quickstart.Consumer
